what_was_requested: Validate, publish, build, clone, save, and backtest cf_cumulative_delta feature through the full research pipeline
what_was_done: Successfully completed steps s1_validate through s1_save: (1) Validated cf_cumulative_delta custom feature after fixing API from ctx['close'] to ctx.series('close') — 337 non-null values out of 348, range ~0.03-0.036; (2) Published cf_cumulative_delta to feature registry; (3) Built feature dataset — 54864 rows processed, active column count increased from 24 to 25; (4) Cloned baseline strategy active-signal-v1 to candidate_cumulative_delta; (5) Saved version 2 with cf_cumulative_delta entry confirmation filter: long requires cf_cumulative_delta > 0.05, short requires cf_cumulative_delta < -0.05. Steps s1_backtest and s1_inspect could not complete because the MCP session corrupted after backtests_plan timeout — all dev_space1 tools disappeared from registry.

results_table.run_id: N/A - MCP session corrupted before backtest could start

key_metrics.signal_long_logic: dow in [0,1,2,3,6] and sum([iv_est in [3,4], rsi in [1], hour in [6], cl_1h in [2]])>=3 and cf_cumulative_delta > 0.05
key_metrics.signal_short_logic: dow in [3] and sum([cl_1d in [2], cl_15m in [3], cl_1h in [1], hour in [15]])>=2 and cf_cumulative_delta < -0.05

error: MCP session corrupted after backtests_plan timeout — all dev_space1 tools disappeared from registry. Backtest could not be launched. Feature pipeline (validate → publish → build → clone → save) completed successfully, but the critical backtest validation step remains incomplete.
raw_output:
